description_long: This object is a triangular sandwich with two slices of toasted bread enclosing a visible filling. The bread has a golden-brown, slightly textured surface with lighter patches, suggesting a toasted or grilled finish. The filling appears to be a thin layer, possibly cheese or a spread, visible along the edge between the slices. The sandwich is neatly cut, with clean, straight edges and a uniform thickness throughout. The overall appearance is that of a classic grilled cheese or similar sandwich, commonly found in urban food settings. There is no visible packaging, branding, or additional garnishes present.
description: A triangular toasted sandwich with golden-brown bread and a thin visible filling, neatly cut and unwrapped.
description_view_0: The sandwich is seen from the side, showing the layered bread and a thin filling between the slices.
description_view_1: This view highlights the sandwich's triangular shape and the toasted texture of the upper bread surface.
description_view_2: The sandwich is viewed from the opposite side, again showing the filling and the sharp, clean cut of the bread.
description_view_3: A side profile emphasizing the even thickness and the layered structure of the sandwich.
